input.content:
# Q3 pricing strategy — derived from planning call

**Source**: Team planning call, 2026-06-28. Raw observation recorded in q3-pricing-note.md (intake).

**Decision**: Pro tier moves from $19/mo to $24/mo starting Q4. New annual plan added at $230/yr (two months saved). The $3 signup grant remains.

**Rationale**: Gross margin on Pro thinned after model-cost increase. Annual plan targets retention past the 90-day churn cliff.

## Next steps
- Verify implementation timeline for Q4 launch
- Coordinate messaging with marketing
- Monitor churn impact post-launch
input.message: Derive q3-pricing-note intake: place raw observation from planning call with derivation citing source
